side_effects.description: Water retention from MK (not GH); mitigated by supplementing extra potassium and magnesium and splitting carbs throughout the day rather than in big chunks

protocol_notes: User also used DNP previously and noted 4kg fat loss but only 1kg scale reduction until ~1 week post-cessation due to water retention. Notes retaining some water on a cut is beneficial for joints. Mentions potassium and magnesium supplementation and carb-splitting strategy helped with MK water retention.
